# Production Logging

**Summary**: The use of tools to measure the flow rate and distribution of fluids in a well.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-al-arfaj|Al-Arfaj, 2012]] used production-logging as a benchmark for validating AI model predictions.
